title: Record soft16 handoff18 and swarm100 densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft16 Handoff18 Swarm100 Contract

## Soft 16
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.16 with quality bias floor 0.14 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 18
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.18 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Swarm 100
swarm expert bodies default to 100 chars, total 3k, inline 20 for denser multi-agent handoffs

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/boundary/status vitest
